creator: j@ida.interface-business.de
text:
Configuring a swap partition of offset 0 (relative to start of slice)
is still broken.  Swapping works now, but a kernel core dump has
finally been clobbering the disklabel.

Fix: 

not yet known.
How-To-Repeat: 
Configure a swap partition at offset 0, enable kernel dumps, and cause
a panic condition.
